name: Redis Insight
tagline: Redis Insight lets you do both GUI- and CLI-based interactions in a fully-featured desktop GUI client.
description:
Redis Insight lets you do both GUI- and CLI-based interactions in a fully-featured desktop GUI client.

Docs: https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/redisinsight/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  redisinsight:
    image: redis/redisinsight:2.70
    environment:
      - RI_APP_HOST=0.0.0.0
      - RI_APP_PORT=5540
      - RI_ENCRYPTION_KEY=79bf23537934d639f016832058473fb9
      - RI_LOG_LEVEL=${RI_LOG_LEVEL:-info}
      - RI_FILES_LOGGER=${RI_FILES_LOGGER:-true}
      - RI_STDOUT_LOGGER=${RI_STDOUT_LOGGER:-true}
    volumes:
      - redis_insight_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - --spider
        - http://0.0.0.0:5540/api/health
      interval: 10s
      retries: 3
      timeout: 10s
      start_period: 10s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42101:5540
volumes:
  redis_insight_data: null
